stemHtml:
Refer to figure.
What must you be aware of when flying towards the large cloud shown in the figure?

options.a: Possibility of clear ice directly above the waves.
options.b: You need to avoid the low side of the wave as the updraft may be so strong that the aircraft is not able to maintain the planned descent path.
options.c: The mass and balance limits maybe be exceeded.
options.d: You need to avoid the low side of the wave as the downdraft may exceed your aircraft's rate of climb capability.
